into a clean core/ module:

- core/infrastructure/circuit-breaker.js: Unified resilience (3 impls → 1)
- core/infrastructure/worker-pool.js: φ-scaled concurrency (2 impls → 1)
- core/pipeline/stages.js: 21-stage canonical pipeline with 5 variants
- core/pipeline/engine.js: THE pipeline engine (6 impls → 1)
- core/orchestrator/conductor.js: Agent coordinator + task router (3 impls → 1)
- core/scheduler/auto-success.js: φ-scaled background scheduler
- core/agents/registry.js: 11 canonical agent definitions
- core/index.js: createSystem() bootstrap
- services/heady-mcp-server/src/core-bridge.js: MCP→core integration
- ARCHITECTURE.md: Complete architecture documentation

- Live and testnet now both at 1:1 — one protocol, one standard

POLL S.6 added — Ambassador Regional Compensation Standard:
- Base: $200/month (all regions, all ambassadors)
- Maximum: $850/month via performance + regional bonuses
- Bonus breakdown: Regional Growth ($200) + Content ($200) +
  Governance ($100) + Regional Excellence ($150)

  misreporting triggers recall eligibility review
- Budget: $24K/yr base-only to $102K/yr full-max
- Total poll count: 50

commit.message:
Add per-version-group Function.prototype for cross-movie __proto__ identity

Each version group (SWF≤6 legacy, SWF7+ modern) now gets its own
Function.prototype object. User-defined functions and built-in constructors
have their own_props.__proto__ set to the appropriate group's
Function.prototype, so cross-group func.__proto__ === comparisons correctly
return false. This resolves all 72 remaining diffs in global_swf5_6_7_8_9
(now 1145/1145 PASS).

Key changes:
- g_function_proto_legacy/modern globals + getFunctionProto() helper
- ensureGlobalInit creates primary Function.prototype, sets on all g_ctors
- ensureSecondaryGlobalInit creates secondary Function.prototype
- createConstructorCopy allocates own_props with secondary Function.prototype
- Secondary extra ctors (String/Number/Boolean/Function/Error) get own_props
- actionGetMember FUNCTION path: virtual __proto__ fallback returns
  version-group Function.prototype for functions without own_props

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style(배포가이드): DEPLOY.md 가독성 개선 및 버전 관리 섹션 추가

Step 8 Phase 1: Import DB operations, API route, UI, and source badges

Step 8.2 — Import DB operations (queries.ts):
- importSession(): single-transaction channel + messages + artifacts creation
- findChannelByOriginalSessionId(): dedup via json_extract on source_metadata

Step 8.3 — Import API route (routes/import.ts):
- POST /api/import/claude-code: parse → validate → dedup check → import → 201
- File validation (.jsonl extension, existence check)
- Empty session detection (400), duplicate detection (409)
- Auto-generated channel names: "{project} — {YYYY-MM-DD}"
- Model resolution via MODEL_ALIASES for legacy IDs
- Registered in server index.ts and test app.ts

Step 8.4 — Import UI (ImportDialog.tsx):
- Modal dialog with path input and optional channel name override
- Loading, error, and success states
- "Go to channel" button on success navigates to imported channel
- Import button in sidebar footer (between Entities and Create channel)
- Wired into App.tsx with channel list refresh on import

Step 8.5 — Source badges:
- "CC" badge on imported channels in sidebar channel list
- Import provenance section in ChannelSettings for imported channels
  (project, import date, event count, Claude Code version)

All 196 tests passing (190 server + 6 client).

commit.message:
feat(ui-server): incremental HMR manifest updates [#991] (#1109)

Add updateManifest() and deleteManifest() to createVertzBunPlugin() for
incremental manifest regeneration during HMR. The file watcher calls
updateManifest() before SSR re-import so the compiler's manifest view
stays current.

Key behaviors:
- Change detection: compare old vs new manifest shape to skip
  unnecessary cache invalidation
- Cache invalidation: manifestsRecord nulled only when shape changes
- Debug logging: VERTZ_DEBUG=manifest logs hmr-update/hmr-delete events
- Diagnostics: recordManifestUpdate() tracks HMR manifest updates

Known limitation (by design): dependent files are NOT automatically
recompiled when an import's reactivity shape changes during HMR.
They get the updated manifest on next full page refresh.

Co-authored-by: vertz-dev-front[bot] <2828126+vertz-dev-front[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ground all 6 Clay generators in real mathematics

Replace synthetic parametric formulas with actual computation:
- RH: mpmath.zeta() + Hardy Z-function + Euler product (15 primes)
- P vs NP: pysat Glucose4 CDCL solver + backbone + UP cascade
- NS: scipy spectral PDE (2D vorticity in Fourier space)
- YM: SU(2) lattice gauge (quaternion plaquettes + topological charge)
- BSD: point counting over F_p + L-function Euler product (44 primes)
- Hodge: intersection form eigenvalues + integrality distance

Sweep confirmed: 5/6 positive separation, BSD strongest signal (0.004 vs 0.535).
Two-class partition: Affirmative={NS,RH,BSD,Hodge}, Gap={PvNP,YM}.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: ck

Metrics now render in standard baseball format (BA→.xxx, ERA→x.xx,
K%→x.x%, counting stats→integers) via METRIC_DEFAULT_FORMAT auto-detection.
Single-player scene-stats API now queries all metric sources in parallel
instead of silently dropping ERA, Triton+, and Deception metrics.

commit.message:
fix: 修复深层爬取多平台数据缺失问题

1. xhs store 补充 topic_id/crawling_task_id 字段写入（之前遗漏导致 dashboard 无法关联）
2. 抖音/贴吧爬虫在首页检测到验证码/安全验证时抛异常，触发 cookie 过期标记
3. worker 返回实际爬取数量，dispatcher 写入 total_crawled/success_count
4. dispatcher 连续 3 次爬取 0 条内容时触发熔断，避免浪费后续任务

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sd_notify support to hived for clean systemd startup ordering

hived now sends READY=1 to systemd after NATS is fully initialized.
The NixOS module switches from Type=simple to Type=notify so dependent
agent services only start once hived is actually ready, eliminating
the exit status 4 race during nixos-rebuild switch.

commit.message:
fix(ui): add LRU eviction to MemoryCache (#1036) (#1108)

* fix(ui): add LRU eviction to MemoryCache to prevent unbounded growth (#1036)

MemoryCache now accepts an optional maxSize (default 1000) and evicts
least-recently-used entries when the limit is exceeded. get() promotes
entries to most-recently-used via Map re-insertion. Uses has() check
to correctly handle falsy cached values (null, 0, false).

SSR caches are unaffected — they are per-request and garbage-collected
at request end. Users can pass maxSize: Infinity to disable eviction.

Closes #1036

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ui): disable LRU eviction for SSR caches

SSR caches are per-request and garbage-collected at request end.
LRU eviction during SSR two-pass render could drop pass-1 data
before pass-2 reads it. Use maxSize: Infinity for SSR caches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ui): guard against negative maxSize causing infinite loop (#1036)

Clamp maxSize to 0 via Math.max() to prevent the while-loop in set()
from running infinitely when a negative value is passed. Add edge case
tests for maxSize: 0, maxSize: 1, and negative maxSize.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ui): handle NaN maxSize and add missing edge case tests (#1036)

NaN maxSize silently disabled eviction (Math.max(0, NaN) returns NaN,
and size > NaN is always false). Fall back to default 1000 when NaN.
Add tests for NaN, empty-string key eviction, and default maxSize
boundary. Add inline comment explaining SSR Infinity maxSize.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add changeset for LRU cache eviction (#1036)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: vertz-dev-front[bot] <2828126+vertz-dev-front[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(theme): align palette to sacred geometry — Fibonacci hues + φ lightness

Hues derived from Fibonacci phyllotaxis offsets on the color wheel:
  Base 340° (pink) + Fib(55)=35° + Fib(144)=124° + Fib(233)=213°

Neutral lightness follows golden ratio power series:
  φ⁻⁴=13% (black), φ⁻³=24% (dark), φ⁻²=38% (medium)

Neutral hue H=262° = φ-weighted midpoint of Sky(213°) + Pink(340°)

Key visual upgrades: deeper violet neutrals, more vivid lime,
richer sky blue, precise Fibonacci-derived sunshine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
